MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Default Prove Up in SCD.

This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, CSR: Ron Sinclair, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Appearances:
Gary Kaplan, Esq. For Plaintiff:UC Hastings College of the Law, by Alani Schuemaker, financial Officer, was sworn & examined.
Exhibit 1- Promisory Note
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffL UC Hastings College of the Law and against the defendant: Christopher Dort As follows: Promisory Note is candelled and to be superseded by the judgment.
Principal of $4,947.74
Interest of $284.69
Collecting fees $ 2,354.58
Costs of $44.00
Attorney fees of $975.00
Total of $8,606.01 less
Down payment of $3,500.00
Balance of $4,341.87 (Total Judgment)
Plaintiff attorney to submit written judgment for signature
